fail_conditions: a constant policy reaching verdict True (would falsify the metric)
limitations: symbolic utterance codes, not natural language
functional valence only — not sentience, consciousness, or subjective feeling
pass_conditions: genuine_fraction >= 0.5 (>= half of seeds clear correct_select 0.5 AND last-third > 1/3)
required_controls: constant-response control (must score genuine_fraction 0 / verdict False)
